creator: adsharma@sharmas.dhs.org
text:
On Sat, Mar 04, 2000 at 02:02:02PM -0800, Chris Piazza wrote:
> 
> ${CHMOD} and ${CHOWN} were added to bsd.port.mk in rev 1.316 on Aug. 22 '99.
> 
> % grep CHMOD\?= bsd.port.mk 
> CHMOD?=         /bin/chmod
> 
> % ident bsd.port.mk 
> bsd.port.mk:
>      $FreeBSD: ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk,v 1.330 2000/03/03 01:23:49 asami Exp $
> 
> What revision of bsd.port.mk do you have?

Thanks. I had:

#       $Id: bsd.port.mk,v 1.313 1999/05/10 23:11:07 asami Exp $

I'm moving to a new version now.

	-Arun
